name: Chocolate Mint Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, butter, salt, eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate-flavored syrup in a large mixing bowl. Beat at medium speed for 3 minutes.
2. Pour the batter into a greased 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking pan. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes (top of brownies will appear wet). Cool completely.
3. Combine the confectioners' sugar, butter, water, mint extract, and green food coloring in a medium mixing bowl. Beat until creamy.
4. Spread the filling over the cooled brownies. Refrigerate until set.
5. Melt the chocolate chips and butter in a small saucepan over low heat. Let cool for 30 minutes or until lukewarm, stirring occasionally.
6. Spread the melted mixture over the filling. Chill before cutting.
7. Store in the refrigerator.
